introSection: Gusanito (English: Worm) was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Parque Zoológico Huachipa in Ate, Lima, Lima Province, Peru.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Gusanito (English: Worm) was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Parque Zoológico Huachipa in Ate, Lima, Lima Province, Peru.



Yellow track and red supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
